philosophy.notes: Tech/utility palette (neutral + green) fits IT portfolio. Terminal graphic in about section reinforces the domain. No drift.

hierarchy.notes: Hero lands name + thesis. Skills → Projects → About → CTA flows logically. Project cards have clear visual separation.

typography.notes: Inter system stack correct for tech/utility. Mono metadata, proper letter-spacing on caps (0.08em). Display negative tracking honored.

motion.notes: Staggered hero entrance at 0.8s ease. Reduced-motion guard applied. Button press microfeedback (1px translateY). Hamburger toggle animation.

specificity.notes: All content specific to Ha Minh Duc: real projects (EnglishTutor, CosmeticWeb, VietSource), real skills, real GitHub. No filler stats.

restraint.notes: Single green accent used on eyebrow + primary buttons only. No competing flourishes. Terminal graphic is one decisive visual move.

summary: Polish pass: aria-hidden on icons, mobile hamburger nav, terminal overflow fix, project card hover states, skill tag hover feedback, duplicated media query merged.
